locations.name: Costa Rican Central Valley
locations.summary: The Central Valley (Spanish: Valle Central) is a plateau and a geographic region of central Costa Rica.

locations.name: 圣何塞省 (哥斯达黎加)
locations.summary: 圣何塞省（西班牙語：Provincia de San José）是哥斯达黎加中部的一个省，北邻阿拉胡埃拉省和埃雷迪亚省，东接卡塔戈省和利蒙省，南面和西面与蓬塔雷纳斯省接壤。面積4,965.9平方公里，2003年人口1,435,447人。下…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Olive sparrow
relations.evidence: superciliosus: Pacific slope from southwestern Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica to the Valle Central in San José Province The olive sparrow inhabits a variety of landscapes across its wide range

relations.evidence: Knopf | date =2003 | location =New York | pages =370 | isbn =0-679-45121-8 }} In Mexico it occurs in chaparral, thorn forest, shrubby abandoned fields, the edges and clearings of subtropical forest, and the understory of tropical deciduous forest

relations.subject: Olive sparrow
relations.evidence: On the Yucatán Peninsula it inhabits both humid forest and dry coastal scrublands. In Belize and Guatemala it is found mostly in semi-arid grasslands, savanna, and scrublands and to a lesser degree the edges of forest. In Costa Rica it is found on the edges and understory of forest and nearby secondary forest
